title: Create Attack 5
description: The fifth season is here! Create Attack is the multiplayer project you are looking for with the Create Mod. Created by HerDoctor and presented by RTO Community
body: ![Create Attack 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50fadaf970f76022c5d695faa7261d44a3279f08.png) Welcome to "Create Attack 5 - Industrialized", the ultimate Minecraft modpack for the industrial revolution! Developed by @herr.doctor, this modpack invites you to unleash your creative energy and revolutionize the world of Minecraft with a variety of mods. Dive into a world of possibilities, from the fine details to monumental constructions. With mods like "Create: Steam 'n' Rails" and "Create: Bells & Whistles", you can build complex machines and systems that inspire your imagination. Explore new territories with mods like "YUNG's Better Desert Temples" and "YUNG's Better Jungle Temples", while never get lost in the world with "Xaero's World Map" and "Xaero's Minimap". Optimize your experience with mods like "Applied Energistics 2" and "Trinkets" to manage resources and customize your character. And don't forget the little details with mods like "Create Deco" and "Immersive Paintings" to bring your world to life. With a variety of mods ranging from technical enhancements to aesthetic improvements, Create Attack 5 - Industrialized offers an unparalleled Minecraft experience waiting for you to explore. Dive in and become the master of industry!
